AC/DC Power Supply

One of my class projects was to build a AC to DC power supply over the course of a quarter. The power supply was built from scratch, including the metal case which we had to bend into shape ourselves using a punch.

We soldered all of the PCB components on, hand-crimped the wires to make the the wiring harnesses, soldered all the wires to their terminals, heat-shrunk insulation around the AC terminals, and mounted everything. The only pre-made parts were the transformer, digital displays, and potentiometers.

Website designed and developed by Alan Robison
